channel.title: Edge on TRISPECTIVE
channel.description: Recent content in Edge on TRISPECTIVE

item.description: 1. Vertical AND Horizontal Fiscal Vertical Fiscal Imbalance: “Money vs. Duty” Gap Center: Levies elastic, broad-based taxes (Corporate Tax, Income Tax, Customs Duties) → ensures uniformity, prevents market distortion, maintains macroeconomic stability States: Bear high-expenditure duties (Police, Public Health, Agriculture, local infrastructure) but depend on limited, inelastic sources (stamp duty, alcohol excise) Result: Center’s revenue surplus vs. States’ revenue deficit → vertical gap → mandates top-down resource flow Horizontal Fiscal Imbalance: “Rich vs.
